  1. org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.mistralai
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.moderation
 
org.springframework.ai.model.mistralai.autoconfigure
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api used by org.springframework.ai.mistralai
    Class
    Description
    MistralAiApi
    Single-class, Java Client library for Mistral AI platform.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletion
    Represents a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ReasoningEffort
    Controls the reasoning effort level for adjustable reasoning models.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ResponseFormat
    An object specifying the format that the model must output.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ToolChoice
    Specifies a tool the model should use.
    MistralAiApi.ChatModel
    List of well-known Mistral chat models.
    MistralAiApi.FunctionTool
    Represents a tool the model may call.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api used by org.springframework.ai.mistralai.api
    Class
    Description
    MistralAiApi
    Single-class, Java Client library for Mistral AI platform.
    MistralAiApi.Builder
     
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletion
    Represents a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletion.Choice
    Chat completion choice.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionChunk
    Represents a streamed chunk of a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionChunk.ChunkChoice
    Chat completion choice.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage
    Message comprising the conversation.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ChatCompletionFunction
    The function definition.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ContentChunk
    Marker interface representing the different content chunks supported.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ImageUrlChunk.ImageUrl
     
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ImageUrlChunk.ImageUrl.ImageDetail
     
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.Role
    The role of the author of this message.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ThinkingContentChunk
    Marker interface representing the different thinking content chunks supported.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionMessage.ToolCall
    The relevant tool call.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest
    Creates a model request for chat conversation.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ReasoningEffort
    Controls the reasoning effort level for adjustable reasoning models.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ResponseFormat
    An object specifying the format that the model must output.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ResponseFormat.Builder
     
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ResponseFormat.JsonSchema
    JSON schema object that describes the format of the JSON object.
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ResponseFormat.JsonSchema.Builder
     
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ResponseFormat.Type
     
    MistralAiApi.ChatCompletionRequest.ToolChoice
    Specifies a tool the model should use.
    MistralAiApi.ChatModel
    List of well-known Mistral chat models.
    MistralAiApi.Embedding
    Represents an embedding vector returned by embedding endpoint.
    MistralAiApi.EmbeddingList
    List of multiple embedding responses.
    MistralAiApi.EmbeddingModel
    List of well-known Mistral embedding models.
    MistralAiApi.EmbeddingRequest
    Creates an embedding vector representing the input text.
    MistralAiApi.FinishReason
    The reason the model stopped generating tokens.
    MistralAiApi.FunctionTool
    Represents a tool the model may call.
    MistralAiApi.FunctionTool.Function
    Function definition.
    MistralAiApi.FunctionTool.Type
    Create a tool of type 'function' and the given function definition.
    MistralAiApi.LogProbs
    Log probability information for the choice. anticipation of future changes.
    MistralAiApi.LogProbs.Content
    Message content tokens with log probability information.
    MistralAiApi.LogProbs.Content.TopLogProbs
    The most likely tokens and their log probability, at this token position.
    MistralAiApi.Usage
    Usage statistics.
    MistralAiModerationApi
    Mistral AI Moderation API.
    MistralAiModerationApi.Builder
     
    MistralAiModerationApi.Categories
     
    MistralAiModerationApi.CategoryScores
     
    MistralAiModerationApi.MistralAiModerationRequest
     
    MistralAiModerationApi.MistralAiModerationResponse
     
    MistralAiModerationApi.MistralAiModerationResult
     
    MistralAiModerationApi.Model
    List of well-known Mistral moderation models.
